profile_backing.finding: NR8 scalar tile regressed on same-worker ts1; the next candidates were safe portable-SIMD f64 lanes or Strassen/recursive GEMM behind a Dot tolerance contract.

baseline.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts1 RCH_WORKERS=ts1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-vgd3x-pass139-baseline-1024 cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- linalg/matmul_2d_1024x1024x1024_f64 --sample-size 10 --measurement-time 3 --warm-up-time 1 --noplot
baseline.decision_note: Recorded as required pre-change baseline but not used for keep scoring because RCH ignored worker preference and the interval was too noisy for comparison with ts1 candidate runs.

candidate.lever: Replace the full NR=4 output-column panel update with safe std::simd f64x4 lane accumulators while preserving one lane per output column and ascending-k accumulation.

proof.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-vgd3x-pass139-proof cargo test -p fj-lax --lib matmul_2d -- --nocapture
proof.details: 7 matmul_2d tests passed, 1 ignored, including packed, threaded, large, and blocked bit-identity tests.

rebench_1024.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-vgd3x-pass139-candidate-1024 cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- linalg/matmul_2d_1024x1024x1024_f64 --sample-size 10 --measurement-time 3 --warm-up-time 1 --noplot
rebench_1024.decision_note: Intervals overlap the prior NR4 same-worker control; this is not a confident real win.

rebench_2048.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-vgd3x-pass139-candidate-2048 cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- linalg/matmul_2d_2048x2048x2048_f64 --sample-size 10 --measurement-time 3 --warm-up-time 1 --noplot
rebench_2048.comparison_note: Did not prove a blocked-path win over pass138's ts1 gated baseline of 146.62ms midpoint; also exposed RCH shared-worker source retrieval drift, so the safe decision is reject and restore source.

isomorphism_proof.tie_breaking_unchanged: N/A: GEMM has no comparison or tie-breaking surface.
isomorphism_proof.floating_point: Candidate assigned one SIMD lane per output column and kept l=0..k-1 accumulation in order with separate multiply and add. It introduced no horizontal reduction, reassociation, mixed precision, or mul_add call.
isomorphism_proof.rng: N/A: matmul_2d consumes no random state.

validation: RCH focused matmul proof passed before perf rejection.
Production tensor_contraction.rs source restored; git diff for crates/fj-lax/src/tensor_contraction.rs is empty.

next_primitive.name: Strassen/recursive GEMM behind Dot tolerance contract
next_primitive.reason: Safe SIMD lane-level arithmetic failed to establish a real keep. The next pass must change algorithmic structure rather than tune the current scalar/packed microkernel.
next_primitive.target_ratio: >=1.3x on 1024^3-2048^3 Dot large-matrix path with explicit JAX-oracle tolerance proof; matmul_2d internal bit-identity path remains unchanged.
